0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Knowledge Base"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Build a structured knowledge base from agent interactions and external sources."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Architecture"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  S[Sources] -->|remember| M[Mnemosyne]\n  M -->|index| SM[Semantic Memory]\n  SM -->|recall| A[Agent]\n  A -->|remember| M\n  \n  style SM fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Storing Knowledge"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," to store knowledge items. Organize via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"knowledge-base\")\n\n# Store documentation knowledge\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"API authentication uses OAuth 2.0 with PKCE flow.\",\n  source=\"documentation\",\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Rate limit is 1000 requests per minute per API key.\",\n  source=\"documentation\",\n  importance=0.7,\n)\n\n# Store from conversations\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Customer reported timeout on bulk export endpoint.\",\n  source=\"conversation\",\n  importance=0.6,\n  metadata={\"ticket_id\": \"T-4521\"},\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Querying Knowledge"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," for natural language retrieval:"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"knowledge-base\")\n\n# Natural language query\nresults = mem.recall(\"How do I authenticate with the API?\")\n\n# Adjust number of results\nresults = mem.recall(\"API rate limits\", top_k=10)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Structured Knowledge with TripleStore"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["For structured subject-predicate-object relationships, use the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class:"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import TripleStore\n\nts = TripleStore()\n\n# Add structured facts\nts.add(subject=\"API\", predicate=\"auth_method\", obj=\"OAuth 2.0 PKCE\")\nts.add(subject=\"API\", predicate=\"rate_limit\", obj=\"1000 req/min\")\nts.add(subject=\"database\", predicate=\"type\", obj=\"PostgreSQL\")\n\n# Query structured knowledge\nfacts = ts.query(subject=\"API\")\nfor fact in facts:\n  print(f\"{fact.subject} -> {fact.predicate} -> {fact.obj}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Maintaining Knowledge"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Replacing Outdated Information"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"knowledge-base\")\n\n# Store updated information\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"API v2 uses OAuth 2.0 with PKCE.\",\n  source=\"documentation\",\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n\n# Remove outdated memory\nmem.forget(memory_id=\"mem_old_auth\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Checking Stats"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"knowledge-base\")\n\nstats = mem.get_stats()\nprint(f\"Total memories: {stats}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Use Case: Customer Support"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"support-kb\")\n\n# Pre-load product knowledge\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Product supports CSV and JSON export formats.\",\n  source=\"product-docs\",\n  importance=0.8,\n)\n\n# Agent handles support ticket\ndef handle_ticket(ticket):\n  # Recall relevant knowledge\n  docs = mem.recall(ticket.description, top_k=5)\n  \n  # Generate response using recalled context\n  response = generate_response(docs, ticket)\n  \n  # Store interaction for future reference\n  mem.remember(\n      content=f\"Ticket {ticket.id}: {response.summary}\",\n      source=\"support\",\n      importance=0.5,\n      metadata={\"ticket_id\": ticket.id},\n  )\n  \n  return response\n","language":"python"}],"\n","$L4"],["$L5"],"$L6"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"fUiUBYSKcd753bAjWi2eN"}
4:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L7",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Knowledge Freshness"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"forget()"}]," to remove outdated memories and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," with high importance for critical facts. Periodically review ",["$","code",null,{"children":"get_stats()"}]," to monitor knowledge volume."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
